perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a white camisole and heavy makeup speaks directly into the camera in a close-up POV style. She uses expressive hand gestures and varied facial expressions, ranging from serious to playfully dramatic. (2) The camera periodically zooms in slightly to emphasize her points as she speaks. (3) In the final phase, a comedic 'sad' filter is applied, showing blue animated tears streaming from her eyes and a comic-style background overlay with '5555' (crying) symbols.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a clear, engaging tone accompanied by upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music. (2) Subtle sound effects like 'pops' or 'dings' coincide with text changes. (3) The vocal tone shifts to a mock-crying or exaggeratedly sad pitch towards the end, and the music transitions to a humorous, melancholic melody with a distinct 'laughing/crying' meme sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '奉勸大家' (Advising everyone) - Hook text. (2) '睡前的時候千萬不要滑手機' (Must not scroll phone before bed) - Functional advice text. (3) '不然真的很嚴重' (Otherwise it's really serious) - Warning text. (4) '神經系統失調' (Nervous system disorder) - Pseudo-medical concern. (5) '靠邀' (Slang exclamation) - Emotional emphasis. (6) '流口水' (Drooling) - Humorous consequence. (7) '看小鮮肉的影片' (Watching videos of young handsome men) - The punchline reveal.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Serious Warning -> Humorous Personal Confession

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible from chest up.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, layered dark hair with bangs, wearing a white spaghetti-strap top, a gold necklace, and prominent false eyelashes and makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with beige walls and a blue bedding visible at the bottom of the frame.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft indoor lighting, likely a ring light or ceiling lamp.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by subverting a typical health advice video format. It starts with a serious warning about using phones before bed but ends with a comedic punchline admitting that the creator's 'symptoms' (drooling) are actually caused by watching attractive men on her screen.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density yellow subtitles with expressive POV talking-head format.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages common 'lifestyle hacks' or 'health tips' video tropes only to pivot into self-deprecating humor, a common trend in short-form social media content.
